user.title: Set Up DogLog
user.description: Enter the name of your first dog to get started. You can add more dogs later using the `doglog.add_dog` service.

abort.already_configured: DogLog is already configured. Use the doglog.add_dog service to add more dogs.

init.title: DogLog Options
init.description: Use the `doglog.add_dog` and `doglog.remove_dog` services to manage your dogs.
